'''Calipsa Province''' was a section of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]] ruled by [[House Calipsa]]. The systems [[Betolio system/Legends|Betolio]], [[Dampher system/Legends|Dampher]], [[Grella system/Legends|Grella]], [[Lorenz system/Legends|Lorenz]], [[Kamper system/Legends|Kamper]], [[New Javis system/Legends|New Javis]], [[Setolio system/Legends|Setolio]] and [[Netolio system/Legends|Netolio]] were in the Pelagia Province before they were ceded to [[House Calipsa]] after the [[Mecetti Purge]]. The [[Calipsa Run]] was the main [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace route]] into this province. Of the systems only two are heavily populated, New Javis and Calipsa. The rest were ore-rich systems dotted with small mining settlements.
